rulings.Case Title: REZA R. DIBADJ VS. LAWRENCE K. LO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER to Amended ANSWER to COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 20, 2020 line 5. PLAINTIFF REZA DIBADJ DEMURRER to Amended ANSWER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Affirmative defenses are sufficiently alleged and are not uncertain. Furthermore, based on the arguments advanced in the moving papers the omission of references to specific causes of action did not impede Plaintiff's ability to understand and analyze the defenses. The Court notes that parties filed severely oversized briefs without leave of Court, without table of authorities or table of contents. Therefore, in each brief all pages of Points and Authorities after page 10 are stricken. In the future such violations by the parties or their counsel will result in the entire briefs being stricken. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: FUELX INC. VS. FORUS, INC . ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 20, 2020 line 6. PLAINTIFF FUELX INC. Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is GRANTED for amounts of outstanding rent prior to surrender of possession and contractual rental payments amount for September-November 2020, subject to reduction by the amount of the Letter of Credit. Plaintiff to prepare order in advance of the hearing including exact numbers in accordance with this tentative ruling and present it at the hearing. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: RIZING CAPITAL 8, LLC VS. OLUSOJI A FANOIKI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 20, 2020 line 7. DEFENDANT OLUSOJI FANOIKI MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is OFF CALEDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Furthermore, there is no valid Proof of Service on file by person who purportedly accomplished service. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CONARD HOUSE, INC. VS. CATHY MUNOZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 20, 2020 line 10. DEFENDANT CATHY MUNOZ MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. CCP 1179.03.5 precludes recovery of rent and other financial obligations under the tenancy (contract damages) in unlawful detainer cases other than those that are based on code-compliant notices to pay rent or quit. (c) "COVID-19 rental debt" means unpaid rent or any other unpaid financial obligation of a tenant under the tenancy that came due during the covered time period. COVID-19 Tenant Relief Act is silent regarding the recovery of holdover damages. =(501/CFH)
